title: Lucid (LCID) Stock Price Prediction 2025 and 2026: Can LCID Recover Amid Bearish Sentiment?
text: MEXC analysis from late 2025 questioned whether Lucid could recover from bearish sentiment. The analysis highlighted challenges including persistent losses, high cash burn, and competitive pressures. Potential recovery catalysts identified included Gravity SUV success, robotaxi revenue, and potential equity capital raise. The analysis predicted recovery would require sustained positive news flow and execution wins across multiple fronts simultaneously. 2026 recovery appeared unlikely given headwinds, with 2027-2028 offering better prospects if execution improves.
